response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_status : varchar
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_status : varchar
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR scheduled_departure : date
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY Crew
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar

ENTITY CrewRole
PK crew_role_id
ATTR crew_role_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_city_id
REL Flight -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_city_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1..N : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> Crew : 1 -> 1..N : FK=pilot_id
REL Flight -> Crew : 1 -> 1..N : FK=co_pilot_id
REL Flight -> Crew : 1 -> 1..N : FK=purser_id
REL Flight -> Crew : 1 -> 1..N : FK=cabin_crew_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_status_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_status_id
